hero.title: Mysterious Origins
hero.subtitle: The Ninja Sasquatch Games Universe
hero.description: A young Quebec company that breaks the mold to offer you original, fun, and accessible board games for everyone.
hero.mission: Here, we combine creativity, laughter, a touch of mystery, and strong environmental values. Our games are designed to transform your evenings into memorable moments, whether with family or friends.

games.title: Our Creations
games.description: Each game is thoughtfully designed to offer a unique, fun, and environmentally friendly experience.

about.title: Our Mission
about.p1: Ninja Sasquatch Games was born from a passion for creating unforgettable moments around the table. We firmly believe that board games have the power to bring people together and create lasting memories.
about.p2: Our environmental commitment is more than a promise: all our games are made with 100% compostable materials. Because having fun should never come at the expense of our planet.
about.p3: Based in Quebec, we draw our inspiration from local legends, mysterious nature, and the spirit of adventure that characterizes our beautiful province.
about.ecoDesc: Every Ninja Sasquatch game is designed with environmental respect, using compostable materials and responsible production.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: A question? A collaboration project? Want to discover our games? Write to us!
contact.name: Name
